title: Brutal Mace
description: Retexture of the mace so it looks differently
body:
**Vanilla mace looks not so cool? Lets see my variant :p**

# Now there are 2 variants:
> Made heavy core smaller and added more depth and color

![Fancy & Classic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80fc90ec7163b5349e23978311e664ba1d514fd3.png)
### [Fancy] / [Classic]
 
- ### _! Through the Modrinth launcher you can only download fancy variant, go to the modrinth website to get the classic style !_
